name: okidogi
flavor_texts: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.
text: Okidogi is the Retainer Pokémon. It is a poison and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: toxic-chain, guard-dog (hidden). Base stats — HP: 88, Attack: 128, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 58, Sp. Def: 86, Speed: 80. Evolution line: okidogi. Lore: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique. Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.
